title: The 'final' Modifier's Role in Java Inheritance
description: A visual guide showing how applying the 'final' modifier to classes, methods, and variables restricts their use in inheritance hierarchies.
relationships: A Final Class blocks inheritance from any Subclass
A Final Method in a parent class prevents an Overriding Method in a Subclass
A Final Variable's value is fixed and cannot be reassigned, even by a Subclass
